query:
-- 驗證測試資料已清理
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workers WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%核心流程%') as remaining_workers,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%核心流程%') as remaining_clients,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM demands WHERE note LIKE '%測試%' OR note LIKE '%TEST%' OR note LIKE '%test%' OR note LIKE '%核心流程%') as remaining_demands,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignments WHERE workerId IN (SELECT id FROM workers WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%核心流程%')) as remaining_assignments,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM availability WHERE workerId IN (SELECT id FROM workers WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%核心流程%')) as remaining_availability;

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workers WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%核心流程%') as remaining_workers,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%核心流程%') as remaining_clients,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM demands WHERE note LIKE '%測試%' OR note LIKE '%TEST%' OR note LIKE '%test%' OR note LIKE '%核心流程%') as remaining_demands,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignments WHERE workerId IN (SELECT id FROM workers WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%核心流程%')) as remaining_assignments,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM availability WHERE workerId IN (SELECT id FROM workers WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%核心流程%')) as remaining_availability;
